summary: Full E2E testing of DayLaborCrew new features: Landing page CTAs, Verified Contractors page, Our App page, Admin Messages archive toggle, Admin Settings verified contractors section, PayPal graceful fallback, Coupon UI, App Settings page. All features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: MapLibre map throws postMessage error: 'Request object could not be cloned' when trying to set OSM raster tile style after initial load. Map element renders but tiles may not load correctly.

action_items: Minor: Fix MapLibre map style initialization — the map sets an OSM raster tile URL as initial style then overrides on 'load' event, which causes a postMessage clone error. Consider setting the raster style directly in the constructor.
critical_code_review_comments: MapView in VerifiedContractorsPage.jsx passes a URL string 'https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png' as the 'style' prop to MapLibre Map constructor, then overrides it in the 'load' event. The initial style should be a valid MapLibre style object or just set the raster style directly.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@thedaylaborers.com / Admin@123, Contractor: contractor1@test.com / Test@1234
seed_data_creation: 3 verified contractors seeded in DB (Build Pro 1 LLC, Build Pro 2 LLC, Build Pro 3 LLC)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 features tested. Landing page CTA buttons work. Verified Contractors page loads with 3 cards, sidebar works, map renders (minor tile loading issue). Our App page has JobStack link. Admin Messages archived toggle works. Admin Settings shows Verified Contractors section. PayPal unavailable message shows correctly for re_ Stripe key. App Settings page loads with all toggles (Sound, Notifications, Alert Types, Privacy). Coupon validation shows proper error for invalid code.
passed_tests: Landing page - find-verified-contractors-btn and our-app-btn present
Verified Contractors page - header 'FIND VERIFIED CONTRACTORS' shows
Verified Contractors page - 3 contractor cards shown
Verified Contractors page - clicking card opens sidebar
Verified Contractors page - state filter works
Verified Contractors page - map view toggle shows map element
Our App page - JobStack link present and correct href
Admin login and navigation to dashboard
Admin Messages - toggle-archived-btn works and shows archived section
Admin Settings - Verified Contractors section visible
Subscription page - PayPal unavailable message shown (PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID starts with re_)
Subscription page - Switch to Card Payment button present
Subscription page - Coupon input works (invalid coupon shows error toast)
App Settings page - loads with Sound/Notifications/Alert Types/Privacy toggles
